title: The Kiwi Comeback
concept: A fruit couple watch the Fruit Cup final at a Coinplay sports bar; the tiny kiwi underdog scores at the buzzer and the wife melts into ecstatic happy tears — because the husband quietly backed the kiwi on Coinplay.
setting: a glossy late-night Coinplay sports bar in the brand world, a giant neon scoreboard on the wall, violet ambience, floating purple spheres and golden coin particles, shallow cinematic depth of field

cast.name: Rocky
cast.design: a strawberry character with a realistic athletic adult human body and natural proportions, a glossy ripe strawberry as the head, warm strawberry-red human-like skin with tiny seed freckles, expressive human face with thick brows, short green leafy hair tuft, casual dark streetwear bomber jacket; cinematic semi-realistic 3D, lead-character quality

cast.name: Nova
cast.design: a strawberry character with a realistic adult human body, a glossy strawberry as the head with a small green leaf bow, soft strawberry-red human-like skin with seed freckles, very large expressive eyes and full eyelashes, delicate human face built for big emotion, pastel pink top; cinematic semi-realistic 3D, lead-character quality

shots.visual: the couple sit at the bar facing the giant scoreboard showing the Fruit Cup final, a tiny kiwi underdog versus a huge pineapple team, tense final seconds on the clock; Rocky calmly taps his glowing phone while Nova bites her nails
shots.motion: slow cinematic dolly push-in from the bright scoreboard down to Rocky's calm confident face, shallow focus, brand spheres drift

dialogue.speaker: nova
dialogue.line: We're going to lose, the kiwi is tiny!

shots.visual: the buzzer hits and the tiny kiwi scores the winning goal; EXTREME emotional close-up on Nova's face — eyes going wide, welling up, lips trembling, then breaking into an ecstatic disbelieving smile as happy tears roll down
shots.motion: slow-motion macro push onto her eyes, a single happy tear rolls, then her whole face lights up; soft golden glow rises behind her

shots.visual: the bar erupts, golden coins burst into the air; the couple leap up hugging, then Rocky smugly turns his glowing phone to the camera showing a Coinplay bet slip 'KIWI TO WIN — CASHED OUT'
shots.motion: camera orbits around the celebrating couple in slow motion, coins raining, then a snappy push onto the phone screen

dialogue.speaker: rocky
dialogue.line: I backed the underdog on Coinplay.

shots.visual: the Coinplay fox mascot leans into frame beside the glowing logo, gives a confident wink to the camera as coins shimmer
shots.motion: subtle zoom on the mascot, sparkle pop, Coinplay logo glow blooms

brand_payoff: Nova's happy tears pay off because Rocky quietly backed the kiwi underdog on Coinplay.
